name: D-Mannose
summary: Decision-ready summary: D-Mannose is best framed for recurrent UTI prevention context; urinary tract adhesion support; safety screen: diabetes medication review; active UTI needs medical care.
description: D-mannose may reduce urinary pathogens’ ability to adhere to uroepithelium, aligning with UTI prevention use; clinical confidence varies across studies.
mechanisms: Prevents bacterial adhesion (E. coli) to urinary tract epithelium.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
